title: eremophila arbuscula
intro: Eremophila arbuscula, also known as the bush emu bush or bush emu-bush, is a shrub-like plant native to Australia, belonging to the family Scrophulariaceae. The medicinal properties of Eremophila arbuscula include its antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties, making it useful for treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of the plant include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and providing antioxidant properties, which can help to protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. Eremophila arbuscula can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or capsule, and is often used in traditional Australian medicine.
